content.en:
Ye Tian didn't say much to this Sixth Realm, and directly started trading.

Ye Tian took out more than 3,000 multi-dimensional treasures and traded them to the thirty-six Star Secret Techniques.

Then, the other party left.

And their transactions must be kept secret, and they have made an oath that they will not be allowed to be divulged.

After returning to his residence, Ye Tian accepted this secret technique.

"If I were to create it, I wouldn't be able to create it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And the cultivation of the thirty-six Star Dimension Secret Technique also has great limitations, it requires a special extradimensional talent called Star Dimension Talent, or to find a treasure called Star Dimension Heavenly Root, forcibly implant a false Star Dimension Talent, or you can reluctantly cultivate the Star Dimension Secret Technique, but the effect is definitely not very good, and the cultivation is not very high.

The treasure of Xingwei Tiangen is very precious, and it is not easy to get hold of the invincible existence of the "Eight Hundred and Sixty-Three" Six Realms, let alone Ye Tian.

Therefore, he still had to find a way to copy the Star Dimension talent.

According to his understanding, there is only one special race of Xingwei talent-the Xingwei clan.

The Xingwei clan is very powerful, after all, the thirty-six Star Dimension secret techniques were created by the Xingwei clan, this clan has the existence of the eighth realm, and there are many of the seventh realm, even the Tianshu Sect does not dare to provoke the Xingwei clan.

However, after Ye Tian continued to spend money to buy information, he finally found out about the traces of a Xingwei clan.

Tianshu Sect No. 20983.

A sixth realm of the Star Dimension clan has come here, and is cultivating in a treasure land.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian quickly arrived at this extradimensional realm, and then went to the location of the sixth realm of this Star Dimensional clan.

Since the other party was cultivating, Ye Tian needed to wait for the opportunity.

This is a full 60 million extradimensional epoch time.

this day.

The other party finally came out of that treasure land, and Ye Tian's copying talent has been shrouded, and after he came out, the copying talent spied on the other party's talent.

【Star Dimension Talent】

【Copy!】

Ye Tian's copying talent can barely copy the Xingwei talent, and it takes a lot of time.

After a period of time, the Xingwei talent was finally completely copied.

And then it's time to start merging.

Rumble!!!!

After a period of pain, the Xingwei talent was successfully fused.

"That's it, then you can practice the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

......

In the years that followed, Ye Tian went all out to cultivate the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique.

He first used the multi-dimensional wisdom light and the Ten Pivot Golden Plate to deduce and analyze the Thirty-six Star Dimensional Secret Techniques, and then cultivated.

With such assistance, Ye Tian's understanding of the Thirty-Six Star Secret Techniques became more and more thorough, and he began to cultivate.

The mystery of the Thirty-Six Star Dimension actually comes from a special multidimensional star.

It is said that the multi-dimensional star body is called the Star Dimensional Body, and its volume is comparable to that of an extra-dimensional territory, and it is also the highest level dimension in the eighteenth dimensional void.

The Xingwei clan occupied that special multi-dimensional star, and used the power of this multi-dimensional star to gradually change their own bloodline, and under the evolution of countless years, they gave birth to the star dimension talent.

And the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique is to absorb the power of this multi-dimensional star, and this power is too majestic, and it is easy to have problems when you advance, resulting in the erosion of the multi-dimensional star.

It is said that the Xingwei clan has a special repair method, but it needs to pay a huge price, and if the strong people of the foreign clan fail to cultivate, it will be difficult to repair the injury, so they can only ask the Xingwei clan for help.

In other words, if you want to cultivate the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique to an extremely high level, it is too difficult, too difficult, and too dangerous.

But Ye Tian is not afraid, he can't give up copying his body, and just condense one more body.

After a period of time, Ye Tian cultivated to the first realm of the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique.

After that, he began to cultivate the second realm.

He was very lucky, and the second realm was also successfully broken through without failure.

But when he cultivated to the fourth realm, he failed to break through, causing his body to be damaged and eroded by a multi-dimensional astral force, which was very domineering, and his physical body was constantly eroded.

So, he gave up this replica body and used the second replica body to cultivate.

Time flies.

After a long time, Ye Tian had already cultivated the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique to the eighteenth...

At this time, no trace of him could be deduced from any sixth realm, which was much more awesome than the Great Realm Armor Technique of the fifth layer.

Subsequently, he began to attack the nineteenth level of the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique, which was a huge bottleneck.

Ye Tian shocked for the first time and failed.

The second time I impacted, I still failed!

The third time or a failure!

Ye Tian sacrificed dozens of times before he succeeded in breaking through and cultivating the nineteenth realm of the Star Dimension Secret Technique.

"The nineteenth level of the Star Dimension Secret Technique is too difficult, I don't know how the Star Dimension clan can practice it? Maybe they have something to do, or maybe they have a way to heal quickly, so they can practice it. "

Ye Tian continued to cultivate.

The nineteenth Star Dimension Secret Technique is not good, it can only make ordinary seventh realm powerhouses unable to deduce his traces, but the powerful seventh realm can still deduce his traces.

There are still too many seventh realms in the upper realm, and he must cultivate to the twenty-seventh level, so that no seventh realm can deduce his traces, so it is safer.

And this cultivation has passed a billion extradimensional eras.

this day.

Ye Tian had finally cultivated the Thirty-Six Star Dimensional Secret Technique to the twenty-seventh level, and at this time, no trace of him could be deduced from any Seventh Realm.

Only the eighth realm can deduce his traces, but how does the eighth realm exist, how can you pay attention to him with a mere fifth realm.

0.5 So, he's basically safe now.

"Now I won't be involved in other real body copy bodies, I can wander around and get opportunities, and I'm not afraid of offending other forces. Ye Tian muttered.

For Ye Tian, what he wanted most now was to comprehend the rules of the Nine Dimensions.

And he has a dimensional treasure, as well as a multi-dimensional wisdom light and a ten-pivot golden plate to assist in the cultivation of enlightenment, and his efficiency far surpasses that of other Dao Ancestors of the Fifth Realm, but he still feels that it is slow.

The multi-dimensional wisdom light cannot be improved at present, but the grade of the Ten Pivot Gold Plate of the auxiliary things is still low.

On the side of the Upper Domain, there is no so-called multi-dimensional treasure of many tribulations, because there are no multi-dimensional tribulations here.

But here there are various abilities and effects of the dimensional treasure, the value of the innate multi-dimensional treasure.
